notes:
v1.9.6 Update
🎲 PF2e Critical Success Check Trigger: Added a PF2e-only Chat/Roll trigger for skill checks and saving throws that critically succeed.
🔧 Safer Detection: Rules text that merely says Critical Success no longer triggers a cut-in by mistake.

announcement.title: 🎬 Cinematic Cut-ins v1.9.6
announcement.content:
v1.9.6: PF2e Check Critical Success Trigger

  • 🎲 New PF2e Chat/Roll trigger: You can now trigger cut-ins when a PF2e skill check or saving throw rolls a Critical Success.
  • 🔧 Safer detection: Rules text that merely says Critical Success no longer triggers a cut-in by mistake.
